 1263:   function resetAiMasterSelectState(control) {
 1264:     if (!control || !control.classList) {
 1265:       return;
 1266:     }
 1267: 
 1268:     control.classList.remove("ai-master-unmatched");
 1269:     delete control.dataset.aiMasterUnmatched;
 1270:     delete control.dataset.aiUnmatchedValue;
 1271:     control.removeAttribute("title");
 1272: 
 1273:     Array.from(control.options || []).forEach(option => {

 1275:         option.remove();
 1276:       }
 1277:     });

 1252:           appliedCount++;

 2008:   function aiNormalizeForMasterMatch(value) {
 2009:     return String(value || "")
 2010:       .replace(/\s+/g, "")
 2011:       .replace(/[　]/g, "")
 2012:       .replace(/[・･]/g, "")
 2013:       .replace(/[／\/]/g, "")
 2014:       .replace(/[（）()]/g, "")
 2015:       .replace(/[：:]/g, "")
 2016:       .trim()
 2017:       .toLowerCase();
 2018:   }

 2340:

 2347:       }
 2348:     }

 2681:   async function runAiDraftForItemIndex(index, options = {}) {
 2682:     if (!Array.isArray(items) || index < 0 || index >= items.length) {
 2683:       showResult("解析する書類が見つかりません。");
 2684:       return { ok: false, error: "解析する書類が見つかりません。" };

 2698:     }

 3380:   function formatDraftBytes(bytes) {
 3381:     const n = Number(bytes) || 0;
 3382: 
 3383:     if (n >= 1024 * 1024) {
 3384:       return (n / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1) + " MB";
 3385:     }
 3386: 
 3387:     if (n >= 1024) {
 3388:       return Math.round(n / 1024) + " KB";
 3389:     }
 3390: 
 3391:     return n ? n + " B" : "";
 3392:   }

 5485:   function looksLikeDraftSaveButton(el) {
 5486:     if (!el) return false;
 5487: 
 5488:     const button = el.closest("button, input[type='button'], input[type='submit'], a");
 5489: 
 5490:     if (!button) return false;
 5491: 
 5492:     const text = textValue(button.textContent || button.value || button.getAttribute("aria-label") || button.title);
 5493: 
 5494:     if (!text) return false;
 5495: 
 5496:     return text.includes("下書き保存") || text.includes("下書き");
 5497:   }
